---
title: "Test and Treat Intervention for an SIS Epidemic"
description: "Builds a test-and-treat intervention for bacterial STIs, where screening identifies infections enabling rapid treatment to reduce endemic prevalence."
author: "Samuel M. Jenness"
date: "2018-08-01"
categories: [SIS, intervention, diagnosis, treatment, beginner]
order: 3
execute:
  eval: false
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Under Construction
This example is being converted to an annotated Quarto document. In the meantime, you can download and run the standalone scripts:

- [model.R](model.R)
- [module-fx.R](module-fx.R)
:::
